output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY1-090","author":"SarahJ_Leeds","text":"The annual autumn fair at Hyde Park in Leeds is officially open now! There are stalls selling local crafts, live music on the main stage, and a food court with everything from hot dogs to vegan options.
